description: 自建目录浏览器弹窗-前后端联动

api_contracts: ApiResponse<T> envelope: { success: boolean; data: T|null; error: string|null } (packages/shared/src/types/api.ts:9-13)
Web httpGet<T>(url: string): Promise<T> expects ApiResponse<T> and returns body.data or throws HttpError (packages/web/src/utils/http.ts:26-76)
Express mounts routers: app.use('/api/task', createTaskRouter(taskManager)); app.use('/api', createHealthRouter(taskManager)) (packages/server/src/index.ts:31-35)
critical_logic: Route factory pattern: export function createXRouter(dep): Router { const router = Router(); router.get/post(...); return router; } (e.g., packages/server/src/routes/health.ts:12-41; packages/server/src/routes/task.ts:16-147)
Middleware: CORS enabled with env CORS_ORIGIN default http://localhost:5173; JSON body parser enabled (packages/server/src/index.ts:17,27-28)

PathPicker.vue currently uses browser showDirectoryPicker() (if available) and only emits handle.name (not absolute path); fallback uses window.alert(i18n) (packages/web/src/components/PathPicker.vue:69-82)
CreateTask integrates PathPicker via v-model form.projectPath; submit passes projectPath: form.projectPath || undefined (packages/web/src/views/CreateTask.vue:40-90)

changed_files: doc/项目路径选择器/02_技术设计与任务书.md
phase_2.summary: 新增 /api/directories 目录浏览接口并重写 PathPicker 为模态目录导航器，完成中英文 i18n 更新并通过 pnpm build。

evidence.security_note: No base-path allowlist or auth on /api/directories; arbitrary path enumeration is possible within process permissions.
changed_files: doc/项目路径选择器/02_技术设计与任务书.md

phase_3.summary: Build/Test/CodeReview/i18n全部通过。目录API无路径限制属安全备注已记录。FAST模式判定PASS。
